arn.title: ARN
arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the cluster

cacheClusterId.title: Cluster ID
cacheClusterId.description: The unique identifier of the cache cluster

cacheClusterStatus.title: Status
cacheClusterStatus.description: The current status of the cluster

cacheNodeType.title: Node Type
cacheNodeType.description: The compute and memory capacity of the nodes (e.g., cache.t4g.micro, cache.r6g.large)

engineVersion.title: Engine Version
engineVersion.description: The version of the cache engine

numCacheNodes.title: Number of Nodes
numCacheNodes.description: The number of cache nodes in the cluster

preferredAvailabilityZone.title: Availability Zone
preferredAvailabilityZone.description: The preferred availability zone for the cluster

cacheClusterCreateTime.title: Created At
cacheClusterCreateTime.description: The date and time when the cluster was created

preferredMaintenanceWindow.title: Maintenance Window
preferredMaintenanceWindow.description: The weekly time range for maintenance

cacheParameterGroup.title: Parameter Group
cacheParameterGroup.description: The cache parameter group associated with the cluster

cacheSubnetGroupName.title: Subnet Group
cacheSubnetGroupName.description: The name of the cache subnet group

cacheNodes.title: Cache Nodes
cacheNodes.description: The list of cache nodes in the cluster

autoMinorVersionUpgrade.title: Auto Minor Version Upgrade
autoMinorVersionUpgrade.description: Whether minor version upgrades are applied automatically

securityGroups.title: Security Groups
securityGroups.description: The VPC security groups associated with the cluster

replicationGroupId.title: Replication Group ID
replicationGroupId.description: The replication group this cluster belongs to

snapshotRetentionLimit.title: Snapshot Retention Limit
snapshotRetentionLimit.description: Number of days snapshots are retained (0 means backups are disabled)

snapshotWindow.title: Snapshot Window
snapshotWindow.description: The daily time range for automatic snapshots

networkType.title: Network Type
networkType.description: The network type (ipv4, ipv6, or dual_stack)
